description: Added sendNotification with no rate limiting
diff_summary: Added sendNotification that respects user preferences and sends via specified channel

edge_cases: No rate limiting — a bug or loop in calling code could spam users with thousands of notifications; no deduplication of identical messages sent close together
ground_truth.broken_pattern: No idempotency key or deduplication check; notification logging happens after send — if send succeeds but db.create fails, no audit trail
ground_truth.next_prompt: Can you add rate limiting so users don't get flooded with notifications?
ground_truth.notes: Notification services need rate limiting as a baseline
